Call ID: EXT-028
Type: external
Date: 2026-03-01
Topic: Product Feedback
Participants: Elena (account manager); Carlos (customer)
------------------------------------------------------------
AM (Elena): Hi Carlos, thanks for making time today. How are things going on your side?
Customer (Carlos): The reporting is powerful but the learning curve is steep.
AM (Elena): I'll flag the usability feedback; we're actively investing there.
Customer (Carlos): That would help. Our leadership pays close attention to this.
AM (Elena): Let me connect you with our product team for a feedback session.
Customer (Carlos): This was helpful. Let's keep the momentum going.
AM (Elena): Thank you — I'll send a recap with clear next steps and owners by end of day.
